Class Goto

java.lang.Object
utils.Goto
public class Goto extends Object
The Goto class serves as the primary utility and navigation controller for the application. It manages global states, including player data, game timers, background music, and handles transitions between different UI panes such as the title screen, quiz pages, and result screens.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final class 
    Goto.CustomPuzzleEntry
    A record of a custom puzzle entry including its unique ID, difficulty level, and puzzle instance.

    • rootPane

      private static RootPane rootPane
      The root container used to swap different game screens.

      private static javafx.scene.media.MediaPlayer mediaPlayer
      The media player instance used for playing background music and sound effects.

    • questions

      private static final ArrayList<BasePuzzle> questions
      The list of puzzles generated for the current game session.

      private static final ArrayList<Goto.CustomPuzzleEntry> customPuzzles
      The list of custom puzzles created during the session.

      private static long nextCustomPuzzleId
      The identifier for the next custom puzzle to be added.

      public static Player player
      The player instance for single-player modes (Easy, Medium, Hard).

      Player A instance used for the competitive Battle mode.

      public static Player playerB
      Player B instance used for the competitive Battle mode.

      public static DigitalTimer gameTimer
      The shared digital timer used to track remaining time during puzzles.

      The current key event filter used to handle specific key inputs (e.g., Buzz-in keys).

      The recorded width of the primary application window.

  • Constructor Details

    • Goto

      public Goto()

  • Method Details

    • getCustomPuzzles

      public static List<Goto.CustomPuzzleEntry> getCustomPuzzles()
      Retrieves the current list of custom puzzle entries.
      Returns:
      A list of all custom puzzle entries.

    • addCustomPuzzle

      public static long addCustomPuzzle(GameMode difficulty, String answer, List<String> pictureNamesOrPaths, List<String> hints)
      Adds a new custom puzzle to the system.
      Parameters:
      difficulty - The difficulty level for the puzzle.
      answer - The correct solution string.
      pictureNamesOrPaths - A list of image resource names or filesystem paths.
      hints - A list of hint strings (may be null for Easy mode).
      Returns:
      The unique ID of the newly created puzzle entry.

    • removeCustomPuzzle

      public static boolean removeCustomPuzzle(long id)
      Removes a custom puzzle entry by its unique identifier.
      Parameters:
      id - The ID of the puzzle to remove.
      Returns:
      True if a puzzle was removed, otherwise false.

    • getCustomPuzzlesForMode

      private static List<BasePuzzle> getCustomPuzzlesForMode(String gameMode)
      Retrieves custom puzzles filtered by the specified game mode.
      Parameters:
      gameMode - The game mode or difficulty string.
      Returns:
      A list of puzzles matching the criteria.

    • initializeWindowSize

      public static void initializeWindowSize(RootPane root)
      Initializes and records the current window dimensions from the provided RootPane.
      Parameters:
      root - The RootPane instance from which to extract window size.

    • setMediaPlayer

      public static void setMediaPlayer(String musicUrl)
      Initializes the media player with a specific music URL.
      Parameters:
      musicUrl - The resource path or URL of the music file.

    • setRootPane

      public static void setRootPane(RootPane rootPane)
      Sets the global reference for the RootPane container.
      Parameters:
      rootPane - The RootPane instance to be used globally.

    • getRootPane

      public static RootPane getRootPane()
      Retrieves the global RootPane instance.
      Returns:
      The current RootPane.

    • music

      private static void music(String musicPath)
      Stops current playback and starts playing background music from the specified path in an infinite loop.
      Parameters:
      musicPath - The resource path for the music file.

    • clear

      public static void clear()
      Clears all UI components from the RootPane except for the primary background layer.

    • titleScreenPage

      public static void titleScreenPage()
      Navigates to the title screen and starts the title background music.

    • initQuiz

      public static void initQuiz(String gameMode)
      Initializes the quiz data based on the selected game mode. This method resets player health, populates the question list, and shuffles the puzzles.
      Parameters:
      gameMode - The difficulty or mode string (EASY, MEDIUM, HARD, BATTLE).

    • quizPage

      public static void quizPage(String gameMode)
      Constructs and displays the multi-player Battle mode quiz page. Sets up buzz-in event filters and manages health deduction for both players.
      Parameters:
      gameMode - The string representing the BATTLE mode.

    • singlePlayerPage

      public static void singlePlayerPage(String gameMode)
      Constructs and displays the single-player quiz page for Easy, Medium, or Hard levels.
      Parameters:
      gameMode - The selected difficulty level string.

    • checkAnswer

      public static Boolean checkAnswer(String choice, String gameMode, Player currentPlayer, Player opponentPlayer, LifePane opponentLifePane)
      Validates the player's answer against the current puzzle's solution. In Battle mode, a correct answer will deduct health from the opponent.
      Parameters:
      choice - The answer string entered by the player.
      gameMode - The current game mode.
      currentPlayer - The player who submitted the answer.
      opponentPlayer - The opposing player.
      opponentLifePane - The life pane of the opponent to be updated.
      Returns:
      True if the answer is correct, otherwise false.

    • checkQuiz

      public static void checkQuiz(String gameMode)
      Checks the remaining questions and navigates to the next question or the results page.
      Parameters:
      gameMode - The current game mode.

    • resultPage

      public static void resultPage(String gameMode)
      Displays the final result page with unique backgrounds for Win, Loss, or Draw states.
      Parameters:
      gameMode - The game mode that was just completed.

    • levelSelectionPage

      public static void levelSelectionPage(GameModeSelector gameModeSelector)
      Displays the level selection screen using the provided selector logic.
      Parameters:
      gameModeSelector - The selector instance managing mode states.

    • customPuzzlePage

      public static void customPuzzlePage()
      Navigates to the custom puzzle management page.

    • getWindowWidth

      public static double getWindowWidth()
      Returns:
      The current window width.

    • setWindowWidth

      public static void setWindowWidth(double windowWidth)
      Parameters:
      windowWidth - The width to set.

    • getWindowHeight

      public static double getWindowHeight()
      Returns:
      The current window height.

    • setWindowHeight

      public static void setWindowHeight(double windowHeight)
      Parameters:
      windowHeight - The height to set.
